rulings.Case Title: MORELIANO SANTOS CAVICII DZUL et al VS. BHATTI SATHAM SINGH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Pltf'S To Seek Leave To File An Amended And Supplemental Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 21, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFFS MORELIANO DZUL, JUAN RIVAS, WILLIAM CAVICH, MARGARITO YEN, AND RONY DE LEON'S Motion For Plaintiff's To Seek Leave To File An Amended And Supplemental Complaint. OFF CALENDAR, MOTION UNTIMELY PER CCP 1005. DECEMBER 23 MAIL SERVICE DOES NOT PROVIDE 16 COURT DAY NOTICE PLUS 5 CALENDAR DAYS FOR MAIL SERVICE. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ELLEN SEELING VS. BRAZZ ENTERTAINMENT, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 21, 2011, line 4. PLAINTIFF ELLEN SEELING'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is denied. Adding defendant known to plaintiff at time of incident. Stephes v. Berry (1967) 249 CA 2d 474, 479. Unwarranted delay. Emerald Bay Comm. Ass'n. v. Golden Eagle Ins. Corp. (2005) 130 CA 4th 1078, 1098. Maapali v. Farmers Group, Inc. (1996) 48 CA 4th 471. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: DOLORES SALVI VS. MERRIMAN CURHAM FORD GROUP, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 21, 2011, line 9, DEFENDANTS D. MERRIAMN, GREGORY CURHAN, ROB FORD, MERRIMAN HOLDINGS, INC. FORMERLY KNOWN AS, MERRIMAN CAPITAL INC., FORMERLY KNOWN AS MERRIMAN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: DOLORES SALVI VS. MERRIMAN CURHAM FORD GROUP, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 21, 2011, line 9, DEFENDANTS D. MERRIAMN, GREGORY CURHAN, ROB FORD, MERRIMAN HOLDINGS, INC. FORMERLY KNOWN AS, MERRIMAN CAPITAL INC., FORMERLY KNOWN AS MERRIMAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD RESCISSION RATHER THAN ACTUAL DAMAGES. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF SHOULD SPECIFICALLY STATE FACTS CONSTITUTING MISREPRESENTATIONS AND NEGLIGENT ACTS. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 21, 2011, line 10, Order To Show Cause. MATTER TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 301 SAME DAY AND TIME (JANUARY 21 AT 9:30AM). =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: AURORA LOAN SERVICES LLC, VS. PORFIRIO ORTIZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 21, 2011, line 11, DEFENDANTS PORFIRIO ORTIZ, ANGELA ORTIZ, ONEYDA ORTIZ, AND ELEAZAR GARCIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN TO PLAINTIFF. AS A FORMER OWNER, GROSS V. SUPERIOR COURT (1985) 171 CAL.APP.3D 265, DOES NOT APPLY TO DEFENDANT PORFIRIO ORTIZ. CO-DEFENDANTS ALSO FAIL TO SHIFT THE BURDEN BECAUSE THEY FAIL TO PRESENT SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO ESTABLISH THEIR ALLEGED TENANCIES. (THE DECLARATIONS OF CO-DEFENDANTS ARE CONCLUSORY AND DO NOT SET FORTH SPECIFIC FACTS.) =(302/LMG)
